sources.title: Synthetic Data Generation Market Forecast Analysis 2034
sources.claim: Global synthetic data generation market valued at $791.34M in 2026, growing to $6,905M by 2034 at CAGR of 31.10%

sources.title: NVIDIA Reportedly Acquires Synthetic Data Startup Gretel
sources.claim: NVIDIA acquired Gretel in March 2025 for a price exceeding Gretel's $320M valuation; team of ~80 folded into NVIDIA cloud AI developer services

sources.title: Gartner Identifies Top Trends Shaping the Future of Data Science and Machine Learning
sources.claim: By 2024, Gartner predicts 60% of data for AI will be synthetic to simulate reality and de-risk AI, up from 1% in 2021

sources.title: Most AI Training Data Could Be Synthetic By Next Year — Gartner
sources.claim: Gartner forecast that most AI training data will shift to synthetic; confirms 60% prediction and trajectory toward majority synthetic by 2026

sources.title: Synthetic Data Market Size, Share, Trends & Research Report 2031
sources.claim: Synthetic data market growing at 38.96% CAGR over 2026–2031, projected to reach $3.67B by 2031

sources.title: Synthetic Data Generation Market to Reach $7.22 Bn by 2033
sources.claim: Global synthetic data market projected to grow from $0.77B in 2026 to $7.22B by 2033 at CAGR of 37.65%

sources.title: Top 20+ Synthetic Data Use Cases
sources.claim: Waymo simulates 10M+ driving miles daily; Gartner: 84% of organizations use text-based synthetic data; fraud cases <0.1% of transactions require synthetic augmentation

sources.title: Lack of AI-Ready Data Puts AI Projects at Risk — Gartner 2025
sources.claim: Gartner 2025: 75% of businesses will use generative AI to create synthetic customer data by 2026; 60% of data leaders will face critical failures managing synthetic data by 2027

sources.title: Synthetic Data Startups Pick Up More Real Cash — DHS Contracts
sources.claim: US DHS awarded contracts to Betterdata, DataCebo, Mostly AI, and Rockfish Data to develop synthetic data capabilities in 2024

sources.title: New Privacy, Data Protection and AI Laws in 2026
sources.claim: EU AI Act transparency rules effective August 2026; GDPR penalties up to €20M or 4% global revenue; EU AI Act penalties up to €35M or 7% global revenue for prohibited practices

sources.title: Building Scalable Synthetic Data Generation Pipelines for Physical AI with Databricks and NVIDIA Omniverse
sources.claim: NVIDIA Omniverse + Databricks partnership for physical AI synthetic data generation in manufacturing, healthcare, and robotics

sources.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Analytics Market Report 2026
sources.claim: Synthetic data generation for analytics market will grow from $2.23B in 2025 to $2.98B in 2026 at CAGR of 33.8%

sources.title: Synthetic Data Explosion: How 2026 Reduces Data Costs by 70%
sources.claim: Synthetic data can reduce enterprise data acquisition and preparation costs by up to 70% — a key economic driver of adoption

sources.title: Top 6 Synthetic Data Startups Making Waves in 2026
sources.claim: Overview of leading synthetic data startups: Mostly AI, Tonic.ai, Synthesis AI, YData, and others with funding and market positioning

sources.title: Synthetic Data Startups to Watch 2026 — 42 Companies
sources.claim: 42 active synthetic data startups identified; Synthesis AI reported 410.6% revenue growth; Datagen raised $72M — largest funding round in the space

unverified_claims: Exact market share percentages for NVIDIA/Gretel, Scale AI, and Tonic.ai are estimated; no single independent source provides a unified market share breakdown for the synthetic data generation sector.
Synthesis AI's '410.6% growth' figure is as reported in secondary sources; primary source (Synthesis AI annual report) was not directly accessed.
Scale AI's ~18% market share estimate is based on its position in the broader AI training data market, not a synthetic-data-specific measurement.
